Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This feels new and refreshing.[n]{f 1 5 0}The weather was just so pleasant that I decided to take a walk to the shrine.[n]{f 1 5 0}What are you doing now?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}seem to convey something more than a letter could.[n]{f 1 5 0}I'm sitting at the bench again, the weather is fine too.[n]{f 1 5 0}Would you come meet me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}for a moment, I feel forgiven.[n]{f 1 5 0}While this happiness lasts, that bench springs to mind.[n]{f 1 5 0}If you were next to me, there'd be nothing more I could ask for.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}a faint light shines, sparkling down upon its remnants.[n]{f 1 5 0}Though I know it's but an illusion, I find myself longing to reach out to it.[n]{f 1 5 0}I want to talk with you today, at the usual place.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}may seem disparate, but their boundaries meld and flow together, just like the changing of the seasons.[n]{f 1 5 0}Will you hear my lie out?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}is closing in; I've been feeling lighter and lighter.[n]{f 1 5 0}If only I could ride a gust of wind that was you... then maybe I'd make it just a little farther.[n]{f 1 5 0}I have a favor to ask of you. Will you meet me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}it felt like time began to rush by.[n]{f 1 5 0}It may be ironic, but this is just enough for me.[n]{f 1 5 0}I miss you. I want to see you again. That's all there is.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}the words spelled out by my hand would never have been read.[n]{f 1 5 0}I want to tell you the rest in person, on the bench where the sun shines through the trees.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I was fervently typing on my cell phone.[n]{f 1 5 0}Would you come meet me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You don't have to cover your ears to feel the calm passage of time.[n]{f 1 5 0}Come join me if you'd like.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}binds the two of us together in this world.[n]{f 1 5 0}I'm at the shrine today too.[n]{f 1 1}
